name: Age of Empires II (Retired)
description: Age of Empires II has been re-imagined in high definition. With the release of Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition, this product will not be updated further.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *:Windows Vista, 7, 8 Pro+
  • Processor:1.2GHZ CPU
  • Memory:1 GB RAM
  • Graphics:Direct X 9.0c Capable GPU
  • DirectX®:9.0c
  • Hard Drive:2 GB HD space
comment1:
The OG remaster, the OG gameplay. That's the best AOE version so far (better than IV or DE), the community is still very active, specially for such old game.

That being said , multiplayer stutters happens here and there, and DE version, even though I dislike is the future and multiplayer is much more smooth.

Final review: buy only if it's on a discount.
comment2: If you played AoE II as a child, this is the trip down memory lane that you want. I have DE as well, which has some nice QoL improvements, but it's this version that I keep coming back to play. Basically, it's the old game but with support for modern PC's.
comment3: Lovely game. Most satisfying. Build a strong economy and army, to destroy your enemie.
